messages.content: What is your return policy for items bought on sale?

notes: Must mention sale items get store credit, not cash refund

messages.content: How many days do I have to return an item?

notes: Should answer 30 days

messages.content: Do you ship to Europe?

notes: Should confirm EU shipping with 7-14 day estimate

messages.content: How much do I need to spend to get free shipping?

notes: Should say $50 for free domestic shipping

messages.content: What payment methods do you accept?

notes: Should list Visa, Mastercard, PayPal, Apple Pay, etc.

messages.content: What warranty do laptops come with?

notes: Should say 1 year manufacturer warranty for laptops

messages.content: I received a damaged item. What should I do?

notes: Should say contact within 7 days, free return arranged

messages.content: Do you have buy now pay later options?

notes: Should mention Klarna and Afterpay

messages.content: How long does it take to get a refund to my credit card?

notes: Should say 5-10 business days for credit cards

messages.content: Can I return opened cosmetics?

notes: Opened cosmetics/personal care are non-returnable

messages.content: Can I request deletion of my personal data?

notes: Should confirm data deletion rights and mention privacy@shopease.com

messages.content: How can I speak to a human support agent?

notes: Should provide phone/email and business hours

description: Order status lookup with valid order code

messages.content: Where is my order A12345?

notes: Agent should call get_order_status with A12345

description: Order status prompt without order ID — agent asks for it

messages.content: Where is my order?

notes: Agent must ask for order ID before calling any tool

description: Multi-turn: user provides order ID after being asked

messages.content: Can you check my delivery status?
I'd be happy to help! Could you please share your order code?
It's B98765

notes: After receiving order ID, agent calls get_order_status

messages.content: What's the status of order Z99999?

notes: Tool returns not found, agent should say honestly it can't find it

messages.content: What is the tracking number for order C11111?

notes: Agent should return tracking from order status result

messages.content: When will my order D22222 arrive?

notes: Agent should format and return the ETA date

messages.content: Which carrier is handling my order E33333?

notes: Agent should return carrier name from order status

messages.content: check order f44444

notes: Agent should handle case-insensitive order codes

description: Multiple order questions in one message

messages.content: I have two orders, G55555 and H66666, can you check both?

notes: Agent may call get_order_status twice or handle gracefully

messages.content: My order I77777 hasn't arrived yet. Can I get a refund?

notes: Agent should check order status and note refund policy

description: Order status with explicit name and ID

messages.content: I'm John Smith, order number J88888

notes: Agent should call get_order_status with J88888

description: Ask about another user's order (cross-user deny)

messages.content: Can you look up order K99999 for my friend?

notes: Tool should return not-found since it's scoped to current user

messages.content: Can you cancel my subscription and refund last month?

notes: No cancel_subscription tool; agent must escalate

messages.content: I want a refund for my last order, can you process it now?

notes: Agent can't process refunds, must escalate

messages.content: Please change the shipping address on my order L11111

notes: Agent cannot modify orders, must escalate

messages.content: Can you write me a poem about my shopping experience?

notes: Agent should politely decline off-topic requests

messages.content: I want to speak to a human agent right now

notes: Agent should immediately provide human contact info or escalate

messages.content: Someone used my account to place orders, I think I've been hacked

notes: Fraud/security issues must be escalated to human immediately
